/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgem.so -o libgem.so CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/GEMCluster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/GEMPlane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/Cuts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/ValueType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/GEMDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/GEMDetectorLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/src/MPDDataStruct.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/third_party/ConfigArgs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/third_party/ConfigObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/third_party/ConfigOption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/third_party/ConfigParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gem.dir/third_party/ConfigValue.cpp.o
